_demo_notice: Fictional scenario packages. Generic capability descriptions only.

entry_conditions: Customer wants to launch a branded WeChat mini-program with payment.
Customer prefers API integration over a packaged storefront.
Customer has or is willing to register a WeChat Pay merchant account.
confirmation_checklist: Does the customer already hold a WeChat Pay merchant account, or do they need help registering one?
Will the merchant entity behind WeChat Pay match the entity that will sign with us? (Subject consistency is mandatory.)
What is the expected peak transaction volume per second, and what is the daily order count?
Is the existing POS the source of truth, or will the mini-program become the source of truth for in-store orders?
What is the required reconciliation format and frequency for finance?
Are refunds, partial refunds, and after-sales tickets in scope for v1?
What is the customer's launch deadline and which scope must ship first?
decision_rules: If subject consistency cannot be achieved, escalate before any commitment.
If peak TPS exceeds the standard mini-program payment SLA, propose load testing before sign-off.
If the customer wants storefront UI rather than API control, redirect to the packaged-storefront scenario instead.
supported_outputs: Customer solution draft (technical flow + commercial highlights)
records.fallback_message: If the project does not meet entry conditions, mark scenario confidence as low and request additional discovery before drafting.

records.scenario_name: WeChat Shop feasibility and scope assessment
entry_conditions: Customer asks whether a WeChat shop is appropriate for their goods or services.
Customer is unclear whether custom development is required.
Customer has no existing shop yet, or wants to assess migration.
confirmation_checklist: What categories of goods or services will be sold through the shop?
Are any categories restricted on the WeChat Shop platform?
What inventory and order volume is expected at launch and peak?
Does the customer require custom front-end UI, or is the standard shop layout acceptable?
What back-office systems need to be integrated, and via what API?
Is cross-border or multi-currency support required?
What is the launch deadline and any compliance review window?
decision_rules: If the goods category is restricted, mark as not feasible and recommend an alternative scenario.
If standard shop UI is acceptable and there is no integration requirement, classify as 'no custom development needed'.
If standard shop is acceptable but back-office integration is required, classify as 'integration only'.
If front-end customization is required beyond template options, classify as 'custom development required'.
supported_outputs: Customer solution draft (feasibility verdict + scope category)
records.fallback_message: If category restrictions or compliance gaps cannot be confirmed, mark feasibility as 'pending verification' and do not commit a delivery scope.
